title: Practice Session Tacit Media Basic UI
goal: Expose the current step group's tacit image/video media in /practice/session/:sessionId by extending the existing pure tacit detail view-model, without changing practice runtime persistence or sim/admin boundaries.
constraints: Keep current step-group ground truth based on engineState.node_progress plus bundle.step_group_nodes; do not infer the active learning unit from legalActions or media presence
Join tacit_items and tacit_media in a pure helper/view-model inside src/lib/practice/sessionView.ts, not inside Zustand selectors or practiceStore
Do not modify src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/types/practice.ts, router, sim pages, or admin flows unless a blocker is proven from code
Render both image and video in a minimal native way if URLs are directly usable; do not expand into modal/gallery/custom player work
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
Reuse existing gameVariables tokens first; only touch src/styles/gameVariables.css if a truly missing token is proven for the media layout
Treat PracticeMenuPage tacit preview, next-step-group preview, practice admin authoring, debug console, and signed/private media URL handling as out of scope
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure helper/view-model can return the current step group's tacit items with media grouped by tacit_item_id and sorted stably by sort_order
The helper is covered by tests for current-group selection continuity, per-item media grouping, media sort order, and both image/video media types
/practice/session/:sessionId shows the current step group's tacit media inside the existing tacit detail panel while keeping the current title, summary, sensory tags, and empty-state behavior
If a tacit item has no media, the UI stays text-first and does not regress existing tacit item rendering
Existing legal action buttons, ghost guide wording/intensity, session lifecycle, persistence flow, and current learning-unit logic remain unchanged
PracticeMenuPage, PracticeAdminPage, runtime/store derived state, queries/types, sim routes/pages, and debug UI remain unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/sessionView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73
